ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_objectives" TEXT /* Detailed objectives of the project */,
  "project_publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the sample belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "sample_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  "sample_processing_status" TEXT /* Current processing status of the sample (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing step */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the steps are performed */,
  "step_script" TEXT /* Script or tool used for the processing step */,
  "step_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the step in minutes */,
  "step_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing step */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the metric (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_metrics_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES processing_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "denoising" (
  "denoising_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each denoising record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "forward_reads" INTEGER /* Number of forward reads after denoising */,
  "reverse_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reverse reads after denoising */,
  "denoised_date" TEXT /* Date when denoising was performed */,
  "denoising_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the denoised data */,
  "denoising_method" TEXT /* Method used for denoising */,
  "denoising_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the denoising process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("denoising_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_denoising_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merging" (
  "merging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merging record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "merged_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads after merging */,
  "merging_date" TEXT /* Date when merging was performed */,
  "merging_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the merged data */,
  "merging_method" TEXT /* Method used for merging */,
  "merging_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the merging process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merging_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chimera_filtering" (
  "chimera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chimera filtering record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "chimera_filtered_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads after chimera filtering */,
  "filtering_date" TEXT /* Date when chimera filtering was performed */,
  "chimera_filtering_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the chimera-filtered data */,
  "chimera_filtering_method" TEXT /* Method used for chimera filtering */,
  "chimera_filtering_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the chimera filtering process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chimera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chimera_filtering_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., fastq, fasta) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being processed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., denoising, merging, chimera filtering) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in minutes */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
